center.name: Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve
center.summary: Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括縱紋腹小鴞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: (Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve, Norfolk)]] This is a sedentary species that is found in open countryside in a great range of habitats
